_doc: Known-activist CIK registry — read by agents/news/activist_registry.py.
13D classifier matches EDGAR filer CIKs against this list.  Filings
from filers NOT in this list are skipped — that's the design.
2. Search by filer name for each activist below.
3. Copy the 10-digit CIK from the result page (zero-padded).
4. Replace the placeholder CIKs and remove this _doc block.
5. Add your verification date in the 'updated' field.
6. Add a 'notes' string per entry confirming the verification.
1 — Top-tier, proven track record, large positions, market-moving

it like any other config — commit, push, restart news_agent.
